hooks.command: RECAP_FILE="docs/context/$(date +%Y-%m-%d).md"; if [ -f "$RECAP_FILE" ]; then MOD=$(stat -c %Y "$RECAP_FILE" 2>/dev/null || stat -f %m "$RECAP_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); NOW=$(date +%s); DIFF=$((NOW - MOD)); if [ "$DIFF" -lt 180 ]; then exit 0; fi; fi; PROJECT_NAME=$(basename "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"); echo "[auto-recap] Session ending without recap. Please generate a conversation summary now: review the conversation, run git status --short, then write to docs/context/ using the recap skill format. After writing, also update docs/context/META.json and ~/.claude/recap/projects/${PROJECT_NAME}.json with latest session metadata."

MARKER="/tmp/recap_session_$(date +%Y%m%d)"; if [ -f "$MARKER" ]; then exit 0; fi; touch "$MARKER"; LATEST=$(ls -1 docs/context/????-??-??.md 2>/dev/null | sort -r | head -1); if [ -n "$LATEST" ]; then ISSUES=$(grep -A 10 -E '### (Remaining Issues|遗留问题)' "$LATEST" 2>/dev/null | grep '^- ' | head -5); if [ -n "$ISSUES" ]; then echo "[recap] Previous session ($(basename $LATEST .md)) remaining issues:"; echo "$ISSUES"; fi; fi; CURRENT_PROJECT=$(basename "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"); GLOBAL_DIR="$HOME/.claude/recap/projects"; if [ -d "$GLOBAL_DIR" ]; then NOW=$(date +%s); CUTOFF=$((NOW - 86400)); COUNT=0; for f in "$GLOBAL_DIR"/*.json; do [ ! -f "$f" ] && continue; NAME=$(basename "$f" .json); [ "$NAME" = "$CURRENT_PROJECT" ] && continue; MOD=$(stat -c %Y "$f" 2>/dev/null || stat -f %m "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$MOD" -gt "$CUTOFF" ] && [ "$COUNT" -lt 3 ]; then PROJ_ISSUES=$(grep -o '"remainingIssues":\[.*\]' "$f" 2>/dev/null | head -1); if echo "$PROJ_ISSUES" | grep -q '"[^"]*"'; then echo "[recap] Active project '$NAME' has open issues (last active: $(date -d @$MOD '+%m-%d %H:%M' 2>/dev/null || date -r $MOD '+%m-%d %H:%M' 2>/dev/null || echo 'recently'))"; COUNT=$((COUNT + 1)); fi; fi; done; fi
